rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to ports
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), and implication =>
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), and implication =>
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved references
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types
